description: Input schema for Kling O3 Image-to-Video.

image.description: Starting frame image to animate. Supported formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP.
image.title: Image

prompt.description: The text prompt describing the desired motion and action for the video.
examples: The camera slowly zooms in as the person smiles
prompt.title: Prompt

end_image.description: Optional ending frame. The video will transition from the starting image to this image.
end_image.title: End Image

duration.description: Duration of the video in seconds (3-15).

shot_type.description: Shot type control. 'customize' for manual prompt control, 'intelligent' for AI-driven camera work.

generate_audio.description: Whether to generate audio for the video.
generate_audio.title: Generate Audio

tier.description: Model tier. Pro offers higher quality, standard is faster and cheaper.

title: AppInput
